name: Golden Salsa
recipeIngredient: 2 yellow bell peppers, seeded and diced
1 fresh serrano pepper, seeded and minced
1 cup fresh cilantro leaves, coarsely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Core the tomatoes.
2. Cut each tomato in half across the middle.
3. Squeeze out the seeds from each half.
4. Dice the seeded tomato halves.
5. Combine all ingredients except olive oil in a bowl.
6. Refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow flavors to meld.
7. Remove any accumulated juices, stir in the olive oil, and serve.
8. Makes 3-1/2 to 4 cups.
